dialogueChunks.intro: Close the door, {player_name}. What I'm about to propose isn't for public ears.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I've been watching the power structure in {location} for months. The current leadership is weak, indecisive, and the people suffer for it. I have a plan to change that, but I need resources they'd never willingly give me. There's a cache of {quest_item} hidden {location_hint} that belonged to the old regime. With it, I can secure the loyalty of every craftsperson and guard in the settlement. {target_npc} thinks I'm mad, but they'll come around once they see the results.
dialogueChunks.outro: This isn't greed, {player_name}. This is vision. Help me, and you'll have a powerful ally when the dust settles.

playerResponses.text: Vision or ambition, I'll help you claim it.
I'll get your supplies, but I want a cut of whatever comes next.
Power grabs never end well. Find someone else.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I'll be direct. I've never been one for pleasantries and I won't start now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: There's a forge {location_hint} that nobody's used in years. The previous smith who worked it produced weapons that could cut through {enemy_type} armor like parchment. I've studied the technique, and I'm certain I can replicate it: but I need {quest_item} from the old mine to fuel the furnace properly. Once I'm producing those weapons, every settlement in the region will come to me. Not the guild, not the council: me. {target_npc} tried to claim the forge first, but they don't have the skill to use it.
dialogueChunks.outro: I don't need a partner. I need a pair of hands willing to get dirty for the right price.

playerResponses.text: Sounds like a solid investment. I'll get what you need.
Undercutting the guild is risky. But profitable. I'm in.
Schemes like this tend to blow up in everyone's face. No thanks.

dialogueChunks.intro: Sit down, {player_name}. Have a drink. And listen carefully, because what I'm about to offer won't be offered twice.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I run the only tavern in {location}, which means I hear everything. Every deal, every grudge, every secret whispered over ale. I know that {target_npc} has been stockpiling {quest_item} {location_hint} for a trade deal that would make them the wealthiest person in the settlement. I also know the route they're using is crawling with {enemy_type}. If someone were to... acquire that stockpile before {target_npc} can move it, well, the trade deal becomes mine instead.
dialogueChunks.outro: I'm not asking you to hurt anyone. Just to be faster and smarter than the competition.

playerResponses.text: Faster and smarter I can do. Point me the way.
Stealing someone's trade deal? That's cold. But I'll do it for the right price.
This is theft with extra steps. I'm not interested.
